fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Rhode Island CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Rhode Island - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity rhode island, how to transfer CNA license to rhode island, rhode island CNA endorsement application

board.name: Rhode Island DOH
board.mailing_address: Rhode Island Department of Health, 3 Capitol Hill, Providence, RI 02908-5097

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in Rhode Island.

steps.title: Meet Eligibility Requirements
steps.description: Ensure you have successfully completed a Rhode Island Department of Health-approved Nurse Aide Training Program (NATP) or meet the requirements for endorsement/reciprocity from another state.

steps.title: Create a Credentia Account
steps.description: Visit the Credentia Rhode Island Nurse Aide Registry website (credentia.com/test-takers/rhode-island/) and click 'Create an Account' to establish your personal profile.

steps.title: Complete Online Application
steps.description: Log in to your Credentia account and complete the appropriate online application for Nurse Aide certification, whether you are applying by examination or endorsement/reciprocity.

steps.title: Schedule and Pass Examination (If Applicable)
steps.description: If applying by examination, schedule and pass both the written/oral and skills components of the Rhode Island Nurse Aide Examination through your Credentia account.

steps.title: Submit Required Documentation
steps.description: Upload all necessary supporting documents, such as proof of training, background check results, or verification of licensure from another state, directly through your Credentia account.

steps.title: Receive Certification
steps.description: Once all requirements are met and processed by Credentia, your Rhode Island Nurse Aide certification will be issued, and your name will be added to the state's Nurse Aide Registry.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: How much does Rhode Island CNA endorsement cost?
faqs.answer: The endorsement application fee is $35. Additional costs may include background check fees.

faqs.question: Is a background check required?
faqs.answer: Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Rhode Island.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Rhode Island?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 6 to 8 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Rhode Island while waiting?
faqs.answer: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.

reciprocity.endorsement_url: https://credentia.com/test-takers/rhode-island/ (Look for 'RI Nurse Aide Registry Application – By Reciprocity/Endorsement' under 'Forms')
reciprocity.notes: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in RI.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to Rhode Island.

hero.title: Become a CNA in Rhode Island
hero.dek: To apply for Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA) certification in Rhode Island, candidates must create an account and apply through the Credentia Rhode Island Nurse Aide Registry online portal.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in Rhode Island
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to Rhode Island CNA certification.

official_links.portal_name: Credentia Rhode Island Nurse Aide Registry
official_links.registration_steps: Visit the Credentia Rhode Island Nurse Aide Registry website, click 'Create an Account,' and follow the prompts to set up your personal profile, which allows you to manage examinations and certifications.
